name: Woolworth's Lunchcounter Chop Suey Chow Mein (C1950)
recipeIngredient: liquid from canned mushrooms (1 cup total)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat shortening in the pressure cooker.
2. Dust the meat lightly with seasoned flour and brown in batches in hot, smoky oil.
3. Add onion, celery, soy, molasses, and liquids from canned vegetables to the cooker. Cover.
4. Set the rocker (the pot had one pressure setting). Heat until a steady rocking is achieved and cook for 10 minutes.
5. Stir in the vegetables and heat through.
6. Serve: chow mein noodles on bottom; 2 scoops of rice; 1 ladleful of chop suey; extra soy sauce.
